statement: In every magma, Equation 1511 (`x = (y * x) * (z * (w * y))`) implies Equation 270 (`x = ((y * x) * x) * x`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0430
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y x) (op z (op w y)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y x) x) x)
